mapper.select: select fv.id, fv.name, fv.unit, fv.fee_key_id, fk.id as feeKeyId, fk.name as feeKeyName from apartment_fee_value as afv join fee_value as fv on afv.fee_value_id = fv.id and fv.is_deleted = 0 join fee_key as fk on fv.fee_key_id = fk.id and fk.is_deleted = 0 where afv.apartment_id = #{id} and afv.is_deleted = 0
